---
name: Execution Plan
about: Create or revise an implementation plan for multi-step work
title: "[plan] "
labels: ["type:execution-plan"]
---

## Problem

What implementation needs a decision-complete plan?

## Required Deliverable

- [ ] create or update an exec plan in `docs/exec-plans/active/`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] plan includes summary, success criteria, workstreams, risks, and validation
- [ ] linked docs and affected subsystems are identified
- [ ] explicit out-of-scope boundaries are captured

## Validation Commands

```bash
make docs-check
```

## Affected Areas

- [ ] cli
- [ ] sources
- [ ] profiles
- [ ] mount
- [ ] workspace
- [ ] docs

## Out Of Scope

What the plan should explicitly avoid solving.
